name: Bu Ji
page_title: Bu Ji 步璣 [Wu, Jin] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Grandson of Bu Zhi, Bu Ji inherited his marquis when his father Bu Xie died. When Bu Chan feared he was going to be punished and defected to Jin, Bu Ji was sent to Luoyang, given ranks and was to inspect all military affairs of Jiangling. Lü Kang attacked Bu Chan’s city, the Jin reinforcements were defeated and the city fell, Bu Ji was executed.

full_text:
Bu Ji 步璣
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bu Ji (步璣)was born in Xiling. Son of Bu Xie, sent by Bu Chan to Luoyang when the Bu family revolted. Bu Ji was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Bu Ji lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Grandson of Bu Zhi, Bu Ji inherited his marquis when his father Bu Xie died. When Bu Chan feared he was going to be punished and defected to Jin, Bu Ji was sent to Luoyang, given ranks and was to inspect all military affairs of Jiangling. Lü Kang attacked Bu Chan’s city, the Jin reinforcements were defeated and the city fell, Bu Ji was executed.
